case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS DEVOE ANDRE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT DEVOE ANDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
